_note: Leaply Variation Tree taxonomy. Sourced from HTML mockup (other Claude session) + hokuto.leaplyhub.com/message-matrix screenshot. Replace/extend as needed.

core_messages.name: Story Base Movie
core_messages.description: Storytelling-driven hook, narrative arc with character transformation.
examples: My mom carried this for 30 years before someone finally explained why.
She came in for back pain. She left with the answer she'd been chasing for 8 years.

core_messages.name: Kids View
core_messages.description: Reframe through child's perspective — innocence reveals adult absurdity.
examples: My daughter pointed at my neck and asked why I have a 'bump'.
Kids see the truth grown-ups have been ignoring for years.

core_messages.name: Pattern Interrupt
core_messages.description: Stops scroll with unexpected angle, contrast, or visual jolt.
examples: Wait. Did you just feel that crackle in your neck?
Don't keep scrolling if your shoulders are tight right now.

core_messages.name: Aging Is Not the Cause
core_messages.description: Reframes age-related symptoms as fixable, not inevitable.
examples: You're not getting old — your lymph is blocked.
Stop blaming age for what's actually fixable.

core_messages.name: Blocked Lymph Flow from long sitting
core_messages.description: Positions sedentary lifestyle as cause of lymph stagnation and symptoms.
examples: Sit 8 hours a day? Your lymph is screaming.
Your lymph nodes are blocked. And sitting all day makes it worse.

core_messages.name: Body transformation
core_messages.description: Visual before/after promise, body-level change in weeks.
examples: From bloated to slim — without diets.
See the change in 14 days.

core_messages.name: Early Body Warning Signals
core_messages.description: Reframes minor symptoms as early signals of bigger issues.
examples: If you wake up stiff, your body is sending you a warning.
The signs your body shows you decade before it gets serious.

core_messages.name: Expert-Guided Transformation
core_messages.description: Doctor/expert leads viewer through a transformation method.
examples: Physiotherapist of 20 years finally tells you the truth.
Trained at Mayo Clinic — here's what they don't teach you about your back.

core_messages.name: Expert-Relative-Guided Transformation
examples: My mom is a physio. She fixed my neck in 3 weeks.
Doctor sister told me — and I wish I'd listened sooner.

core_messages.name: Lack of confidence
core_messages.description: Body / posture issue creates social confidence problem.
examples: I stopped going to events because of my neck hump.
First photo in 3 years where I didn't ask to be cropped out.

core_messages.name: Relative-as-Proof Transformation
core_messages.description: Family member as proof of transformation success.
examples: I gave it to my husband who scoffed — now he won't shut up about it.
My mom did this for 30 days. The change is unreal.

core_messages.name: Relative-as-Proof Transformation Routine
core_messages.description: Family proof + replicable daily routine focus.
examples: My grandma's morning routine — 5 minutes, 80 years young.
Watch my dad's evening 3-minute ritual.

core_messages.name: Root Cause of Physical Symptoms
core_messages.description: Reveals 'real' cause vs surface symptom marketers usually target.
examples: POV: you finally figured out why your neck always hurts.
Your headaches aren't from screens. They're from this.

core_messages.name: Stress Stored in the Body
core_messages.description: Frames emotional stress as physical tension to release.
examples: Your shoulders are holding 6 years of stress. Time to put it down.
Trauma lives in the body. Here's where yours is.

core_messages.name: Superficial Fixes Don't Work
core_messages.description: Dismisses common 'band-aid' solutions to elevate product.
examples: Foam rollers don't work for this. Here's what does.
Stretching is treating the symptom. Treat the cause.

core_messages.name: Time spent on dumb ways
core_messages.description: Mocks time wasted on ineffective methods, positions efficient solution.
examples: I spent $4K on massages before realizing it was THIS the whole time.
10 years of physical therapy. The fix took 30 days.

pain_points.name: general
pain_points.description: Generic wellness / low energy / vague malaise

pain_points.name: legs
pain_points.description: Leg swelling, heavy legs, varicose feel

pain_points.name: plantar fasciitis
pain_points.description: Foot pain, especially morning, heel sharp pain

pain_points.name: neck hump
pain_points.description: Buffalo hump / dowager hump, visible from side

pain_points.name: sciatic nerve
pain_points.description: Shooting pain from lower back down leg

pain_points.name: deep hips
pain_points.description: Hip flexor / deep glute tension, sitting-related

visual_formats.name: Text-Centric
visual_formats.description: Large overlaid text drives the message; minimal action

visual_formats.name: Professional Authority
visual_formats.description: Doctor / expert in clinical setting, lab coat, authoritative gaze

visual_formats.name: Native / Raw UGC
visual_formats.description: Selfie-style, real-person raw feel, no production polish

visual_formats.name: Social Interaction
visual_formats.description: Two people conversation, dialogue / advice format

hook_types.name: Problem-reveal
hook_types.description: Names a hidden problem viewer didn't know they had

hook_types.name: Pattern interrupt
hook_types.description: Unexpected visual or statement to stop scrolling

hook_types.name: Curiosity gap
hook_types.description: Promises a reveal — viewer must watch to find out

hook_types.name: Frankenstein
hook_types.description: Mash-up of multiple winning hook formats
